artPrompt: A dramatic moment at a rain-slick dock as two goblin gangsters heave a weighted bundle off the edge into the black reservoir, a glinting coin spilling from its pockets to catch the amber lamplight before it sinks, ripples spreading across the deep water. Mist coils, the night swallows the splash. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, hushed criminal finality, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Sleeps with the Fishes
text:
Destroy target creature. If it dies this way, you create a Treasure token from whatever was in its pockets, and its controller may be invited to do you a favor sometime.
They found the boots. Just the boots.
flavorText: The Whateverville Reservoir is very deep and asks no questions.
